_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: Both brains point upward — the analyst explicitly predicts Complacency with rising prices as sentiment catches up to the structural ETF bid, while the narrative writer expects a liquidity-fueled snapback from the accumulation bottom — but conviction stays low given the analyst's 0% direction accuracy and unresolved VIX/MVRV divergences.
next_move.brains_agree: Yes on direction (UP), but split on conviction and timing — analyst is cautious and low-conviction, narrative writer is high-conviction and more aggressive on the reversal.
next_move.confirmed_if: BTC breaks $68K with funding staying below 0.01% and Fear & Greed rising above 40
next_move.invalidated_if: VIX spikes above 20, DXY breaks 102.5, or BTC loses $62K with funding flipping negative
